subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #040 The Knowledge of the Divine Manifestations
subcodes.first_line: Knowledge is of two kinds: existential knowledge and formal knowledge—that is, intuitive knowledge and conceptual knowledge.
subcodes.first_line_orig: علم بر دو قسم است علم وجودی و علم صوری یعنی علم تحققی و علم تصوری
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @special knowledge of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @station of the Manifestation of God, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar], @knowledge; recognition of God, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight
